flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Eagle Gate College-Murray rose 195% between 2017 and 2020 ($14.6k → $43.0k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Eagle Gate College-Murray fell 30% between 2021 and 2024 (35.7% → 25.0%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Eagle Gate College-Murray fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Eagle Gate College-Murray rose 92% between 2021 and 2024 (52.0% → 100.0%).
